summary: Incomplete deliverable: workflow references non-existent test files (matrix-generator.test.ts, integration.test.ts) and fixtures (simple-config.json, etc., lines ~20-40), so workflow will fail immediately. Workflow lacks explicit permissions section. Steps 17-40 have 4 near-identical "Generate matrix" steps differing only in fixture name—should consolidate. act-test-harness.ts exists but is unused by workflow, creating confusion. act-result.txt will not be generated. Core logic (index.ts, matrix-generator.ts) is sound, but deliverable is non-functional and would not ship.
